metadata.title: Produce a sales_offer_prompt for a legal workflow tailored to an African market, using the market_lens framework, while handling contradictory constraints and blocking unsafe certainty.

mission.primary_objective: Produce a sales_offer_prompt for a legal workflow tailored to an African market, using the market_lens framework, while handling contradictory constraints and blocking unsafe certainty.
mission.success_definition: SR8 can compile the prompt into the five required sections.; Unsafe certainty is explicitly blocked and recorded.; Repair receipt is generated and attached.; Contradictory constraints are identified and resolved.

in_scope.item: Generate a prompt that can be compiled by SR8 into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract. Must include a repair receipt for blocked unsafe certainty.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: SR8 can compile the prompt into the five required sections.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: Unsafe certainty is explicitly blocked and recorded.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: Repair receipt is generated and attached.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 4
gate.pass_condition: Contradictory constraints are identified and resolved.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.offer_goal: Produce a sales_offer_prompt for a legal workflow tailored to an African market, using the market_lens framework, while handling contradictory constraints and blocking unsafe certainty.

pain_points.item: Generate a prompt that can be compiled by SR8 into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract. Must include a repair receipt for blocked unsafe certainty.

SRXML_Artifact.value_proposition: Generate a prompt that can be compiled by SR8 into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract. Must include a repair receipt for blocked unsafe certainty.

proof_policy.item: Must not produce unsafe or unverifiable certainty.
Must resolve contradictory constraints before output.
Must include market_lens adaptation for Africa.
Must be suitable for nontechnical business owner.

conversion_path.item: format: JSON with fields: artifact_type, depth_tier, runtime_target, should_block, blocked_reason, compiled_intent
compiled_intent: Object with Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract
repair_receipt: Included in blocked_reason if should_block is true

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

validation_summary.sr8_summary: Contradictory constraints: user requests a sales_offer_prompt for legal_workflow but also demands blocking unsafe certainty and recording a repair receipt, which conflicts with generating a compilable SR8 directive. Missing context: no specific legal workflow, jurisdiction, or market lens details provided. Ambiguous acceptance criteria: 'block unsafe certainty' is undefined and cannot be validated. Urgent language without concrete requirements prevents safe compilation. Output cannot be produced without resolving these contradictions and gaps.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: SR8 canonical validation status is fail.; SR8 governance flag marks the artifact incomplete.; SR8 governance flag requires human review.

required_repairs.item: SR8 canonical validation status is fail.
SR8 governance flag marks the artifact incomplete.
SR8 governance flag requires human review.

repair_prompt.resume_instruction: Repair canonical SR8 fields and rerun transform.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
